text.title: Email Lifecycle Architecture Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Email Lifecycle Architecture end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: inventory-programs
step.action: List every program + sender + subscriber count + trigger.

step.name: map-to-stages
step.action: Assign each program to one of six stages.
step.decision-gate: If a program does not fit a stage, refuse to publish until reclassified.

step.name: set-global-cap
step.action: Set global cap N=3-5 emails/week; mark transactional exempt.

step.name: consolidate-suppression
step.action: Merge into one global list keyed on email.

step.name: audit-consent
step.action: Verify every record carries source + legal basis.
step.decision-gate: Reject records missing source — quarantine for re-opt-in.

step.name: publish-and-schedule-audit
step.action: Validate + publish + schedule next quarterly audit.
